# Pull request

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New PM cell
- [ ] New historical case
- [ ] New / improved module
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Tests

- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] PM cells validated via `pm_loader.load_all_cells` (if schema changed)

## Scope policy confirmation

- [ ] This PR contains **no Volume 11 (weaponization) content**.
- [ ] This PR does **not** target an in-progress / undisclosed case.
- [ ] This PR does **not** include classified or distribution-restricted material.
- [ ] If imagery is added, the source license permits redistribution.

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] Style follows project conventions (ruff / black)
- [ ] Type hints present on public APIs
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
